problem_text_cn:
1436 使用读数显微镜测量长度或位移的主要误差是视差和螺距误差。消除视差方法是应使物体的像与读数显微镜标尺（刻在分划板上）在同一平面上。具体操作时，应先调节目镜使分划板清晰，即分划板处于目镜焦平面上。然后，调节物距，使待测物体的像也成在分划板上，这时分划板也很清晰，这样可消除标尺与像因不在同一平面上而产生视差。消除螺距误差方法是读数显微镜上的千分螺杆移动时，两次（左和右）位置测量都应在准丝向一个方向移动，并达到与圆相切时的读数，这样可避免螺距误差。测量玻璃毛细管的内径，数据如下表：
| 毛细管端面 | $\phi_1/\mathrm{mm}$ | $\phi_2/\mathrm{mm}$ | 直径$d/\mathrm{mm}$ |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| A端 | 6.280 | 5.496 | 0.784 |
| A端 | 6.196 | 5.390 | 0.806 |
| A端 | 6.496 | 5.711 | 0.785 |
| A端 | 6.457 | 5.652 | 0.805 |
| A端 | 6.162 | 5.354 | 0.808 |
| B端 | 3.098 | 2.303 | 0.795 |
| B端 | 4.168 | 3.354 | 0.814 |
| B端 | 4.440 | 3.644 | 0.796 |
| B端 | 4.486 | 3.701 | 0.785 |
| B端 | 3.344 | 2.560 | 0.784 |
直径$\bar{d} = 7.96 \times 10^{-2}\ \mathrm{cm}$。
problem_text_en:
1436 The main errors in measuring length or displacement with a reading microscope are parallax error and pitch error. The method to eliminate parallax error is to make the image of the object and the scale of the reading microscope (engraved on the reticle) on the same plane. In specific operation, first adjust the eyepiece to make the reticle clear, i.e., the reticle is on the focal plane of the eyepiece. Then, adjust the object distance so that the image of the object to be measured is also formed on the reticle, and the reticle is also clear at this time, which can eliminate the parallax caused by the scale and the image not being on the same plane. The method to eliminate pitch error is that when the micrometer screw on the reading microscope moves, the two (left and right) position measurements should be taken when the准丝 moves in one direction and reaches the tangent to the circle, which can avoid pitch error. Measure the inner diameter of a glass capillary, with data as follows:
| Capillary end | $\phi_1/\mathrm{mm}$ | $\phi_2/\mathrm{mm}$ | Diameter $d/\mathrm{mm}$ |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| End A | 6.280 | 5.496 | 0.784 |
| End A | 6.196 | 5.390 | 0.806 |
| End A | 6.496 | 5.711 | 0.785 |
| End A | 6.457 | 5.652 | 0.805 |
| End A | 6.162 | 5.354 | 0.808 |
| End B | 3.098 | 2.303 | 0.795 |
| End B | 4.168 | 3.354 | 0.814 |
| End B | 4.440 | 3.644 | 0.796 |
| End B | 4.486 | 3.701 | 0.785 |
| End B | 3.344 | 2.560 | 0.784 |
Diameter $\bar{d} = 7.96 \times 10^{-2}\ \mathrm{cm}$.
img_cn: 图1436_1：毛细管内径测量示意图及数据表格
img_en: Fig. 1436_1: Schematic diagram and data table for measuring capillary inner diameter
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】视差消除：先调目镜使分划板清晰，再调物距使物像与分划板共面；螺距误差消除：千分螺杆单向移动，两次读数沿同一方向。毛细管内径取A、B端测量平均值，$\bar{d} = 7.96 \times 10^{-2}\ \mathrm{cm}$。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】Parallax elimination: first adjust the eyepiece to make the reticle clear, then adjust the object distance to make the object image and reticle coplanar; Pitch error elimination: micrometer screw moves unidirectionally, and two readings are taken in the same direction. The inner diameter of the capillary is the average of measurements at ends A and B, $\bar{d} = 7.96 \times 10^{-2}\ \mathrm{cm}$.
problem_answer: 毛细管内径：$\boldsymbol{7.96 \times 10^{-2}\ \mathrm{cm}}$；测量关键：消除视差和螺距误差，多次测量取平均。
